programme.title: Geprek Aja Terus Cintaku Sampe Ke Penghulu
programme.desc: Ojan (Masaji Wijayanto) was tricked by a thug and had to pay for 3 portions of Nadia's (Larasati Nugroho) geprek chicken. Ojan's debt was because Nadia asked him to fix her motorbike which suddenly broke down. From Nadia's conversation with her father, it turns out that Ojan also just found out that the girlfriend Ojan wanted to meet was cheating on him with Nadia's boyfriend.

programme.desc: Insight – Bali : A Paradise Lost : Bali tourism has created prosperity for the population but also brought environmental & cultural degradation. They try building a full-scale roller coaster, becoming musicians, building a backyard beach, and traveling back in time to meet dinosaurs. Their family pet, Perry the Platypus, doubles as a secret agent and battles evil. Meanwhile, older sister Candace is tattling on them to Mom and Da

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Central Victoria is ‘river & ranges country', and is an easy drive out of Victoria's capital,Melbourne. Epic scenery, outstanding natural beauty, lots of history, and down to earth hospitality, ourroad-trip through Central Victoria does not disappoint.

programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: Ultimate Freedive

programme.desc: Kematian nenek Jane menimbulkan tanda tanya pada seluruh kakitangan hospital. Rancangan Edna untuk menamatkan zaman bujangnya musnah, setelah Edna melihat sendiri wajah sebenar Hantu Raya tersebut.

programme.title: Maskulin: Who's Your Bro Ep09
programme.desc: Saksikan bagaimana 12 peserta, dipasangkan menjadi duo dinamik, mengharungi cabaran yang menguji ketahanan dan persahabatan sejati mereka.

programme.title: Roti Cicah Susu Ep04
programme.desc: Arissa hairan bagaimana gambar Ibu Markissa ada di dalam simpanan Datuk Ratna. Umaira memesan hidangan roti cicah susu di kedai makan menyebabkan Arissa yang berada di meja sebelah terkejut.

programme.title: Rumah Tanpa Luka Ep15
programme.desc: Selepas dibuang kerana mempertahankan adiknya yang menghidap sindrom Down, seorang wanita muda yang tabah mesti mengemudi pengkhianatan, kemiskinan dan kehilangan tragis untuk mencari sebuah harapan.

programme.title: Kipas Belum Mati
programme.desc: Mia, seorang artis meningkat naik, membuka kelab peminatnya dan dibantu oleh Lynn yang menjadi pengurus. Dengan bantuan Lynn, kelabnya maju namun ada harga yang harus dibayar di sebalik kejayaan tersebut.

programme.title: Uncle Bos Mama Ep03
programme.desc: Josh menuduh Fish menipu mengenai status perkahwinan dan anak semasa temuduga. Dalam masa yang sama Fish diancam dengan saman satu juta oleh ibu bapa Khalif, pelajar yang sering membuli Shairil.

programme.title: Tumpah Teh with Sarimah Ep07
programme.desc: Logesh dari Keluarga Kumar membawa kita menelusuri belakang tabir perjalanan media sosialnya, berkongsi budaya Asia, makanan tradisional & kehidupan seharian dengan dunia.

programme.title: Bidadari Kiriman Tuhan Ep01
programme.desc: Manis dan Yusuf merancang untuk melangsungkan pernikahan mereka secepat mungkin. Suria yang tergila-gilakan Yusuf, mula menghasut Manja untuk menghalang perkahwinan Manis dan Yusuf.

programme.title: Talk To My Manager S2 Suku Akhir Ep08
programme.desc: Talk To My Manager menggabungkan selebriti ternama bersama anak mereka dalam suasana pertandingan yang menguji kemahiran, kreativiti dan daya ketahanan. Dihoskan oleh Datuk Aznil Hj. Nawawi.

programme.title: Post Mortem Talk To My Manager S2 Ep08
programme.desc: Mengupas cerita-cerita panas dan up to date tentang apa yang berlaku sepanjang konsert mingguan Talk To My Manager.

programme.desc: Azura dikhianati suami dan sahabatnya, lalu berdepan rahsia gelap keluarga yang menghancurkannya. Mampukah dia bangkit menuntut keadilan dan menemukan semula kekuatan diri?

programme.title: (DL) World News
programme.desc: Delivers timely and in-depth coverage of key global events, focusing on international politics, economics, and societal changes, with a spotlight on the latest developments impacting the world today.

programme.title: TVS Music
programme.desc: TVS Music is a compilation of songs that celebrates the rich and diverse musical talents of the region, featuring a mix of contemporary hits and culturally inspired tracks from local artists.

programme.title: The Recollection Project Ep01
programme.desc: In ancient Mukah, A'likou follows Tugau, a fisherman who defies tradition to save his sister from sacrifice, fulfilling a prophecy to rise against tyranny during the Kaul festival.

programme.title: Border Towns of Sarawak Ep02
programme.desc: Documentary filmmaker Yusmal Ghazali explores borderlands, immersing in local life, meeting officials, villagers, entrepreneurs. Revealing history, traits, economy, tourism, post-pandemic challenges.

programme.title: (L) TVS Sana Sini
programme.desc: A local perspective on international and domestic affairs, TVS Sana Sini offers concise news stories the Weather Report, providing a look at climate and environmental conditions affecting the country

programme.title: Tony Lapar Lagi! Ep05
programme.desc: Tony bukan chef,tapi meneroka warisan kulinari melalui penceritaan.Satu hidangan membuka kisah;menilai sama ada resipi dihidupkan,diperbaharui atau dipelihara.Siri ini meraikan evolusi makanan Malaysia.

programme.title: (DL) Detik Dunia
programme.desc: Detik Dunia membawakan rangkuman berita antarabangsa, mengetengahkan perkembangan global serta kisah-kisah yang membentuk landskap dunia hari ini.

programme.title: (DL) TVS Ringkas
programme.desc: TVS Ringkas brings the latest breaking news, offering quick and essential updates from both within the country and around the globe.

programme.title: TVS Fillers
programme.desc: TVS Fillers delivers quick, engaging segments on Sarawakian culture, local trends, and more, keeping viewers entertained between programs.

programme.title: Bujang Berani S2 Ep03
programme.desc: Memaparkan patriot Sarawak yang tidak didendang dan yang masih hidup untuk menceritakan kisahnya. 3 episode menampilkan 3 pahlawan lelaki, 3 episode menampilkan tokoh wanita (women empowerment).

programme.title: Living Wild Ep04
programme.desc: Living Wild is a nature documentary in Sarawak, Borneo, showcasing diverse wildlife-from tarsiers and flying snakes to turtles-across Kubah, Bako, and Talang Satang, promoting eco-tourism.

programme.title: (L) Berita Iban TVS
programme.desc: Berita Iban memaparkan berita-berita terkini di seluruh Malaysia dalam bahasa Iban

programme.title: 3 Mak Dara S2 Ep11
programme.desc: 3 Mak Dara kembali untuk Musim Kedua dengan nafas baharu yang lebih bersahaja dan santai. Dihoskan oleh tiga orang selebriti tanah air iaitu Raja Azura, Sharifah Shahora dan Rita Rudaini.

programme.title: A Legacy Ep01
programme.desc: A Legacy is an evocative series that embarks on a journey through the cultural heart of Borneo, unravelling the stories behind three of its most cherished traditions: Kek Lapis, Tuak, and beadmaking.

programme.title: (L) TVS Tengahari
programme.desc: TVS Tengahari presents a comprehensive look at domestic and international news stories, providing viewers with an in-depth understanding of current affairs during the midday broadcast.

programme.title: TVS Music
programme.desc: TVS Music is a compilation of songs that celebrates the rich and diverse musical talents of the region, featuring a mix of contemporary hits and culturally inspired tracks from local artists.

programme.title: Kenyalang Badminton Talent Ep10
programme.desc: Dengan aspirasi dan inisiatif ini, kami amat berharap untuk mencari bakat-bakat pemain baru Badminton Sarawak seterusnya meningkatkan pembangunan dan perkembangan sukan Badminton di Sarawak

programme.title: Wedding Stone Ep04

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 25
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina.
